element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Fundamental controls established before difficulty escalation
Players learn to navigate around obstacles after basic mechanics
Environmental factors add complexity after spatial awareness established

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Turn-based strategic pacing with escalating course difficulty; tension builds through hole progression rather than real-time pressure

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory courses with straightforward layouts and minimal hazards
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased hazard density and introduction of environmental factors (wind, slope)
difficulty_curve.late_game: Complex course layouts with multiple hazard types and demanding shot angles
notable_spikes: First course with mandatory water carry
Tournament modes with cumulative scoring pressure

notable_level_patterns.description: Courses systematically introduce par-3, par-4, and par-5 holes with increasing complexity
Water hazards appear before sand bunkers; combinations emerge in later courses
Wind and terrain changes create unique challenge signatures for each course

extraction_note: Source file (tcrf) contains only navigation and policy information without substantive game design documentation. No usable design data was available for extraction. All values reflect golf game genre conventions and reasonable design inference, not verified documentation.
